_description: Peripheral entry schema templates for TuyaOpen platform variant JSON

A_countOnly._use: No user-configurable pins; count is the only meaningful info

B_portArray._use: Multiple numbered instances, each with its own pin assignment

<peripheralName>.note: Call tkl_io_pinmux_config before init to select group

C_channelMap._use: Many indexed channels, each maps to one pin or a small fixed set of pins

D_pinBlock._use: Sequential bank where all instances share a pin-range and a prefix-based ID

fieldConventions.idPrefix: TKL constant prefix for sequentially numbered instances (e.g. TUYA_GPIO_NUM_)
fieldConventions.pins: Object — single fixed pin group { signal: pin }
fieldConventions.pinGroups: Array of pin-group objects — selectable alternates (mutually exclusive)
fieldConventions.pin: String — single-pin entry used in channelMap channels
fieldConventions.note: Human-readable caveat: reserved ports, init requirements, production restrictions
